title: Use dummy artifacts for dashboard coverage
decision: Populate each leaf content folder in test-project with one short artifact in the folder's expected format.
context: The human dashboard needs consistent sample content across the full project tree.
rationale: A single seeded project is easier to inspect than many ad hoc fixtures.
impact: Markdown and JSON rendering paths can be checked from one project.
Archive and communication sections have explicit placeholder coverage.
alternatives_considered: Manual spot checks in a subset of folders
notes: Dummy content must remain clearly labeled and disposable.
